# Security policy

## Supported versions

Only `main` is supported. This repo describes live running infrastructure; there are no release branches.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Email <shariq.farooqui@outlook.com> with details of the issue and, if possible, a proof of concept. Please do not open a public issue for suspected vulnerabilities.

Expect an initial response within a few days.

## Scope

In scope: anything tracked in this repository and the services deployed from it. Out of scope: upstream container images and third-party services, which should be reported to their respective maintainers.
